name: Brazil
description: Ad creative strategy for the Brazilian market, emphasizing high-saturation visuals, Funk music, extreme wealth-poverty contrast, and quick gratification. Leverage features of Meta, TikTok, and Kwai platforms to achieve high conversion at low CPA. Core psychological drivers: Instant Gratification and Social Proof, leveraging Brazilian users' high resonance with dramatic social stories.
focus: Within the first 2 seconds, show money/number explosions (flying coins, x100 multiplier) or extreme distress (mother begging with child, being kicked out of home).
Use Funk Carioca or Sertanejo as BGM; voiceover must have passionate Brazilian accent (Carioca or Paulista), avoid European Portuguese.
High saturation, high contrast visuals; use national colors green, yellow, blue, and red-purple combos; numbers must be large with shadows; bold fonts.
Vertical video: 92% ratio; create strong visual or emotional impact within first 3 seconds (e.g., slap, kiss, grand prize reveal).
If using real person, they should be extremely excited, shouting at the camera showing grand prize, or making exaggerated expressions (e.g., wide eyes, hand over mouth).
Screen recordings should retain phone status bar, low battery indicator, or social notifications (e.g., WhatsApp messages) to boost authenticity.
Copy includes benefit inducement ("Ganhe recompensas reais hoje!"), intelligence challenge ("99% dos brasileiros não conseguem."), or social bandwagon ("Todo mundo está jogando isso no ônibus.").
CTA must use "Jogue Agora" or "Instale Grátis".
Show progress bar evolution from Bronze to Diamond, or visual evolution from slum to mansion.
If mini-game loading exceeds 5 seconds, 70% of users churn; optimize loading speed within 3 seconds.
Avoid long rule explanations; users only watch visuals, ignore text.
rules: Within first 2 seconds, show money/number explosion (e.g., x100 coins flying) or extreme distress (e.g., mother begging with child).
Must use Funk Carioca as BGM; voiceover must have passionate Brazilian accent, avoid European Portuguese.
Visuals must be high saturation and high contrast; use national colors green, yellow, blue and red-purple combos; numbers must be large with shadows.
Video must be vertical with 92% ratio; create strong visual or emotional impact within first 3 seconds.
If using real person, they should be extremely excited, shouting at camera showing grand prize.
Screen recordings must retain phone status bar, low battery indicator, or social notifications to boost authenticity.

Copy must include benefit inducement (e.g., "Ganhe recompensas reais hoje!"), intelligence challenge ("99% dos brasileiros não conseguem.") or social bandwagon ("Todo mundo está jogando isso no ônibus.").
CTA must use "Jogue Agora" or "Instale Grátis".
Show progress bar evolution from Bronze to Diamond.
If mini-game loading exceeds 5 seconds, 70% of users churn; optimize loading speed.
Avoid long rule explanations; users only watch visuals, ignore text.
constraints: Materials must be adapted to Kwai platform, with a more down-to-earth style; can try 15-second localized short dramas.
Avoid European Portuguese accent, otherwise users reject.
Avoid overly complex gameplay explanations; visuals should be intuitive.
Material decay cycle is about 10-20 days; requires frequent updates.
culture_notes: Brazilian users strongly resonate with social stories about 'wealth gap', 'betrayal', 'divorce', etc.
Kwai has a strong influence in Brazil's lower-tier market; materials need to be more down-to-earth.
Brazilian users naturally have strong performance desire; real-person footage performs well.
Taboo: avoid European Portuguese accent; avoid cold aesthetic style.
Local trending topic: combine social media popular dances into parkour background.
creative_hooks: Desire for success: visual evolution from pauper to billionaire.
Sense of justice: punishing cheating husband or greedy boss.
Decompression satisfaction: large-scale spray painting, high-pressure water cleaning.
Intelligence challenge: '99% of Brazilians can't do it'.
Social bandwagon: 'Everyone is playing this on the bus'.
Extreme contrast: from dirty slum room to clean ASMR organization.
